mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_tbl1 (member_id, member_pw, member_name, member_grade, member_nickname, member_email, member_thumb, enroll_date, member_status, manner_score, trade_count) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, 2, #{memberNickname}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberThumb}, SYSDATE, 1, 0, 0)
mapper.select: select member_id from member_tbl1 where member_email = #{memberEmail} fetch first 1 row only
